title: Talon Squadron (disambiguation)
content:
'''Talon Squadron''' can refer to

*[[Talon Squadron (New Republic)|Talon Squadron]], a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] starfighter unit commanded by [[Myn Donos]].
*[[Talon Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Talon Squadron]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] strike squadron consisting of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]].
*[[Talon Squad]], a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] squad of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].

{{Disambig}}
